hero.concept2Sub: : Seamless world built by people with tenacity

background.p1: Tenacities was founded in March 2022 with a focus on Metaverse.
background.p2:
Since I was young, I wanted to build a “world.”
A company is also a “world,” so I naturally chose entrepreneurship.
background.p3:
After repeated attempts, failures, experiences, and growth, the keyword “Metaverse” came to me.
I did not fully understand it at first, but it felt destined.
Because Metaverse itself is “a world.”
background.p4: Though old-fashioned, I view the world through the lens of “修身齊家治國平天下.”
background.p5:
As I am one world,
my family is one world,
and my company is also one world.
background.p6: But I have no state to govern, nor any wish to conquer the world,
background.p7: so I expand my life and awareness through my own adaptation: “修身 齊家 治社 愛天下.”

philosophy.title: 🧭Philosophy
philosophy.note: * Tenacities aims for Metaverse, but our view may differ from academic discourse.
philosophy.s1p1: Many people confuse Metaverse, 3D worlds, and virtual reality. Tenacities did too at first.
philosophy.s1p2: After continued exploration, we interpret Seamless world as the essence of Metaverse.
philosophy.s2p1: The self exists continuously and seamlessly across places and moments.
philosophy.s2p2: Even after entering middle school, I cannot act as a member until my profile is registered and assigned a student ID. I am seamless, but the world is not—because of centralized systems.
philosophy.s2p3: The same applies when moving from Korea to the U.S.: without registration in local systems, one cannot exist as a participant.
philosophy.s2p4: The relation between Metaverse and decentralization is not merely political; it reflects a human desire for seamless survival. Coin, NFT, and blockchain appear together for that reason.
philosophy.s3p1: For building a Seamless world, we define three essentials: housing, food & beverage, and labor.
philosophy.s3p2: Even as AI replaces many jobs, if people can sustain the essence of labor within a housing and food ecosystem, they can keep their will to live.
philosophy.s3p3: Wherever we go—even if humanity migrates to Mars—we aim to build a Seamless world self-sufficient in these three dimensions.
philosophy.s4p1: Tenacities aspires to a world where people with will are given more opportunities.
philosophy.s4p2: Tenacities is a group of people committed to cultivating better lives.
philosophy.s4p3: We aim for a Metaverse where people with tenacity can live freely.

history.title: 📜 History
history.item202205: 2022.05. Technology review approved for KRW 200M by KIBO
history.item202305: 2023.05. Final selection for NIPA Metaverse Early-stage Infrastructure Program
history.item202312: 2023.12. Narae House short-term rental platform outsourced development and launch
history.item202406: 2024.06. Concierge Gangnam integrated short-term rental management service
history.item202412: 2024.12. Concierge + dining annual sales reached KRW 1.3B

index.footer: Built from source material in assets/images/, rebuilt as a refined multi-depth brand website.

ci.primaryColorDesc: It symbolizes passion, but is tuned with depth and saturation to express sustained tenacity rather than short-term emotion.
ci.meaning1: TENACITIES: 사명 Tenacities의 각 글자를 추상적으로 형상화.
ci.meaning2: From seed to fruit: The lower semicircle (seed), middle vine (stem), and upper semicircle (fruit) symbolize continuity of the value “修身 齊家 治社 愛天下”.
ci.meaning3: Steady flame: The torch grip and flame shape express long-term tenacity over rapid success.
ci.meaning4: Two joined hands: Customers and team members are seen as members of the same ecosystem, aiming for cyclical co-prosperity.
ci.meaning5: Other symbols: Symmetric butterfly wings and top-bottom balance motifs represent balance between responsibility and authority.
ci.footer: CI section designed as a structured brand identity area.

history.archiveIntro: You can browse each milestone in a vertical timeline. Each item links to a detail page and, when needed, to subpages.

archive.202312: 2023.12 단기임대중개 플랫폼 나래하우스 외주개발 및 런칭

2022_08.li1: Service integration for F&B delivery inside Metaverse.
2022_08.li2: NFT goods provided for F&B orders placed via Toany.
2022_08.li3: Attendees included 3 investors (1 AC, 2 VC), 10 pre-registered users, 1 Twitch streamer, and 1 Invest News reporter.
2022_08.li4: Investment negotiation with Blissvine Ventures at a KRW 4B valuation.
2022_08.li5: Metaverse busking event with 4 performers and 16 audience members.
2022_08.li6: Metaverse group blind date: 4 men and 4 women.
2022_08.li7: Metaverse group meeting: 4 mixed-gender teams (2 per team).
2022_08.li8: Home potluck party: 3 male teams and 1 mixed participant team (2 per team).
2022_08.li9: Without guaranteed large concurrent users, there is no content to enjoy.
2022_08.li10: Without enjoyable content, there is no reason for continuous connection.

2023_05.h1: 2023.05. Final selection for NIPA Metaverse Early-stage Infrastructure Program

2023_06.li1: Failed to understand VR app store ecosystem and optimize for VR.
2023_06.li2: Launch was abandoned because prolonged development made it impossible to retain developers and designers.
